meta.title: Integrating Cybersecurity Accelerated Computing & AI Technologies Into OT
meta.description:
Warning: This is one of the most commercial presentations ever on a S4 stage. The reasons we put it on stage is NVIDIA is the massive leading company providing AI infrastructure and the thumbnail shows this new announced offering could find it's way into many OT security offerings in the next 1 to 3 years. NVIDIA was not a sponsor of S4x25.

Ofir Arkin of NVIDIA announces the Bluefield DPU, sensor and enforcement point, that can be integrated into OT solutions. Bluefield replaces the network interface card. 

Bluefield sends data to the NVIDIA's Morpheus AI cybersecurity software framework.

Ofir goes over a number of broadly stated use cases. We had hoped, and will be looking, for specific cases with OT security partners and products. 

Even with all these caveats, if you want to see a likely future OT security product path, you should watch this.
